equivalence_argument: No ExecutorRegistryService implementation exists locally to fetch receipts and detect TeeDA logs.

negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: ExecutorRegistryService does not fetch block receipts or identify TeeDA-address logs.
related_but_insufficient_code: Provider receipt APIs such as receipts_by_block exist in storage and RPC code, but they are generic receipt accessors.
No audited repo contains ExecutorRegistryService or service.rs, and no code iterates block receipts for logs matching a TeeDA contract address to update executor registry state.

rationale: The primary diff adds ReceiptProvider to the service bound, fetches receipts_by_block by block hash, iterates receipts/logs, and logs when a log address matches teeda_contract_address. The commit subject calls this Phase 1 block processing and TeeDA contract detection. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: When processing a canonical block for executor events, ExecutorRegistryService must fetch receipts for the block hash, iterate every receipt log, and identify logs whose address equals the configured TeeDA contract address.
suggested_falsification_tests: Provide a mock provider with receipts containing logs from the TeeDA address and other addresses, process a block, and assert the service queries receipts for that block hash and emits detection only for TeeDA-address logs; also assert missing receipts and provider errors are handled without panic.
summary: TeeDA receipt-log detection service is absent.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Provide a mock provider with TeeDA and non-TeeDA receipt logs and assert ExecutorRegistryService detects only TeeDA logs; the service type is absent.
title: TeeDA logs are detected from block receipts
